The '''advanced gunship fighter''' was the successor of the [[gunship fighter]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
These gunship fighters were armed with a single [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]]. Unlike the earlier incarnation, this gunship fighter had more advanced laser weaponry and armor.

==Appearances==
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of advanced gunship fighters}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
